zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Harcla於1292年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德吉可比 斯蒂芬時，她的父親Michael de Harcla III53歲，母親Joan FitzJohn32歲。她於大約1316年與Sir Robert Leybourne在英國維斯特莫藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1327年在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Harcla于1292年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德吉可比 斯蒂芬时，她的父亲Michael de Harcla III53岁，母亲Joan FitzJohn32岁。她于大约1316年与Sir Robert Leybourne在英国維斯特莫藍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1327年在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Harcla was born in 1292, in Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, England, her father, Michael de Harcla III, was 53 and her mother, Joan FitzJohn, was 32. She married Sir Robert Leybourne about 1316, in Westmorland, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1327, in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Harcla est née en 1292, à Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Michael de Harcla III, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Joan FitzJohn, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Leybourne environ 1316, à Westmorland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1327, à Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Harcla 1292 in Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Michael de Harcla III 53 und ihre Mutter Joan FitzJohn 32. Sie hat um 1316 in Westmorland, England Sir Robert Leybourne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1327 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Harcla è nata il nel 1292 nel Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, England, sua padre, Michael de Harcla III, aveva 53 anni e sua madre, Joan FitzJohn, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Leybourne circa 1316, nel Westmorland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1327, nel Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Harclaが1292年にイギリスウエストモーランドキルクビー ステフンで生まれた時，父Michael de Harcla IIIは53歳，母Joan FitzJohnは32歳であった。約1316年にイギリスウエストモーランドでSir Robert Leybourneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1327年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Harcla(이)가 1292년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 커k비 스티븐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Michael de Harcla III(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan FitzJohn(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1316년 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 Sir Robert Leybourne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1327년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Harcla nasceu em 1292, em Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Michael de Harcla III, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Joan FitzJohn, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Leybourne aproximadamente 1316, em Westmorland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1327, em Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Harcla родилась в 1292 г. в местности киркби стифен, вестморланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Michael de Harcla III было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Joan FitzJohn, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Leybourne около 1316 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1327 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Harcla nació en 1292, en Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Michael de Harcla III, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Joan FitzJohn, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Leybourne aproximadamente 1316, en Westmorland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1327, en Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 35 años.
